origin: Western Maharashtra and Gujarat tribal regions
description: Ancient tribal art form using geometric patterns and natural pigments
historicalBackground: Created by Warli tribes for over 3000 years, primarily depicting village life and nature

paintings.title: Village Celebration
paintings.description: Tribal community gathering for celebration with geometric patterns

paintings.title: Hunting Expedition
paintings.description: Tribal hunters with animals in forest setting

paintings.title: Harvest Season
paintings.description: Community engaged in harvesting crops with traditional methods

paintings.title: Forest and Wildlife
paintings.description: Dense tribal patterns depicting forest ecosystem and animals
